## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature (minor)
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix (patch)
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` / `perf` / `test` / `ci` / `chore`
- [ ] **Breaking** — describe migration in CHANGELOG

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)
- [ ] Realtime docs still say **SSE** for events and **WS** only for VoIP
- [ ] Env vars added to `.env.example` when applicable
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] No secrets committed

## AI assistance
